mapper.select: SELECT id, name, created_at FROM categories ORDER BY name
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM categories WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, created_at FROM categories WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
